onboarding.title: Welcome to AgentLab!
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your account in a few steps
onboarding.step1Desc: To use AgentLab, you need an Anthropic API key (BYOK)
onboarding.step2Desc: Choose a template and customize your AI agent
onboarding.step3Desc: Your account is set up. Let's chat with your agent!
onboarding.howToGetKey: How do I get my key?
onboarding.apiKeySteps:
1. Go to console.anthropic.com
2. Create an account or log in
3. Go to API Keys
4. Create a new key and paste it here

hero.title: Your AI agents,
hero.subtitle: Build custom AI agents powered by your Anthropic key. Full control, zero vendor lock-in.

byok.title: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK)
byok.desc: Use your own Anthropic API key. Pay Anthropic directly, no markup.

templates.title: Ready-made templates
templates.desc: 8 agent templates to start quickly. Personal assistant, dev helper, professor, and more.

custom.title: Fully customizable
custom.desc: Define personality, tone, language, and extra instructions. Your agent, your rules.

history.title: Conversation history
history.desc: All conversations saved. Pick up where you left off anytime.

secure.title: Secure by default
secure.desc: Keys encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Your data is yours.

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.desc: Interface in PT-BR and EN. Agents that respond in the language you prefer.

cta.title: Ready to create your first agent?
cta.subtitle: Start free. No credit card required.
